openGraph.title: Pokemon Type Calculator
openGraph.ogTitle: Pokemon Type Calculator - Type Matchup Analyzer
openGraph.description: Set up to 3 defending types to instantly see 4×, 2×, 1×, ½×, ¼×, and 0× type matchups. Includes full Gen 6+ type chart.

title: Pokemon Type Calculator
description: Select up to 3 defending types to see damage multipliers (4×, 2×, ½×, ¼×, 0×) for every attacking type.

section.typeChartDesc: Based on Gen 6+ (rows: attacking type, columns: defending type)

message.maxTypes: You can select up to 3 types at a time.
message.selectPrompt: Select a Pokemon's type above to see its type matchups.
